statement: Injection-detection and prompt-injection linting are commodity: NVIDIA garak (37+ injection probes) and promptfoo (50+ vuln types, runs as a CI check) already do build/CI-time injection scanning, so agent-enterprise's unicode/bidi + injection-marker linter is reinventing existing CI scanners.

evidence.quote: Garak (NVIDIA) is an OSS LLM vulnerability scanner with 37+ probes including direct/indirect/encoding-based prompt injection. Promptfoo covers 50+ vulnerability types... runs as a CI check on every deployment.

falsifier: Demonstrate garak/promptfoo test a live model's RESPONSES (dynamic red-teaming), whereas agent-enterprise statically lints authored artefact TEXT for hidden-instruction smuggling (zero-width/bidi) before any model runs — a distinct, complementary control they do not perform on static skill source.
